title: NYC Veterans' Services (DVS) — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Veterans' Services (DVS) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the DVS Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/veterans, and the VetConnectNYC care-coordination intake (Combined Arms). Includes the NYC geography spine, DVS's own resource key (DVS_RES_ID), and veteran-specific vocabularies (military branch, discharge status, service era, service category).

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

MilitaryBranch.description: Branch of military service ('Branch' / 'Branch of Service' / 'Military Affiliation').

DischargeStatus.description: Character of discharge ('Discharge Status' / 'Discharge Type' / 'Character of Discharge').

ServiceCategory.description: DVS service vertical, from the nyc.gov/site/veterans/services navigation and the assistance-request / case service types.

ResourceReference.description: A reference to a DVS-catalogued resource or veteran-owned business by its DVS resource key.

dvsResId.description: DVS resource identifier ('DVS_RES_ID') — DVS's primary key for Resource Map entries and veteran-owned businesses.
